_comment: Scaffold snapshot for tests/integration/search-legacy-parity.test.ts. The parity test is gated on RUN_LEGACY_PARITY=1 because it needs a reachable SearXNG instance. To regenerate: run the pre-refactor search code against a live SearXNG and overwrite this file with the real { query, expectedUrls } pairs. Generation script is deferred to a follow-up task.
